name: Sole with Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons chopped fresh basil or dill
recipeInstructions:
Serve with a green vegetable along with potatoes, rice, or bread.
1. On a microwave-safe plate, arrange tomato slices in a single layer.
2. Arrange the fish to cover the tomatoes. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.
3. Sprinkle with basil and pepper to taste.
4. Cover with vented plastic wrap. Microwave on high power for 3 minutes or until
the fish is almost opaque and flakes easily when tested with a fork.
5. Remove from microwave and let stand for 1 minute. If necessary, pour off excess liquid.
6. Makes 1 serving. Double the ingredients and microwave for 4-5 minutes on one plate for 2 servings.
CONVENTIONAL OVEN METHOD:
1. In a shallow baking dish, arrange the fish.
2. Cover with sliced tomatoes. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.
3. Sprinkle with basil and pepper to taste.
4. Bake in a preheated 400°F (200°C) oven for 12 minutes or until the fish is almost opaque
and flakes easily when tested with a fork.
